violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. PIC voluntarily disposed of ice. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
The (ceilings and wall ) in the (kitchen ) area is in poor repair. Observed holes. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2024
Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the bar. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
The hand-washing sink in the bar was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.PIC voluntarily disposed of ice. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024
(Prep Unit ) located in the (kitchen) area was not in good repair. Ambient temperature observed at 54DF. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
Establishment is lacking sink stoppers for bar. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep tables) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024
Hose to HVAC system was observed draining into handwash sink. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
The establishment is lacking an outside dumpster. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024
The floors in kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024

The (ceilings ) in the (back storage ) area is in poor repair. Missing ceiling tiles. The door frame in the kitchen is has exposed wood and drywall The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter were observed in the (back outside) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024

The back storage room have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, other debris, and clutter. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024
The floor and wall junctures in the (kitchen) do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the (kitchen ) area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
